commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=a897ab1fd1fe1c35011be1fdeec534271333ae18)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds explicit config write paths to preserve caller-set values that equal runtime defaults, wires them from config set/patch operations into write options, and adds helper-level regression coverage.

Reproducibility: yes. The linked issue gives a concrete `config set`/`config patch` reproduction, and current source shows the same failure path through `createMergePatch(runtimeConfig, nextConfig)`; I did not run live writes because this was a read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Needs contributor or maintainer follow-up because the patch has a narrow correctness bug and the proof gate is mock-only, which blocks automated repair/merge handling for this external PR.
